_meta.name: recent-period
_meta.explanation: Hand-authored expected output for the recent-period input fixture. Each entry below is what the analyst SHOULD emit when run against the matching input file.

expectedFindings.rationale: Spend 1000 is ~2.04 standard deviations above the 6-network mean (~252). Just above Z_THRESHOLD = 2.0.
CPA D7 of 350 vs trailing 30-day baseline of 200 = +75% move. Above PCT_DELTA_THRESHOLD = 25%. Meta sub_d7 = 30 clears COHORT_D7_MATURITY_THRESHOLD = 10.
Spring Push campaign spend moved +60% vs prior period. Above PCT_DELTA_THRESHOLD.
Old Awareness campaign spend moved -45% vs prior period. Above PCT_DELTA_THRESHOLD.
